messages.content: 请帮我翻译下面这段话：“设备内部允许存储100条检测数据，容量溢出后，将删除记录中历史时间靠前的存储记录，为当前检测的数据开拓空间；”

The device allows storage of 100 pieces of detection data internally. Once the capacity is exceeded, the device will delete the storage records with the earliest historical time to make space for current detection data.

请帮我翻译下面这段话：“2> 记录数据的具体项目：记录被检电梯编号、参数、检测方式、总行程、实时梯速、平均减速度、检测结果、检测结论；
3> 记录数据中，设备进行查询的操作过程，以及能提供显示的具体项目：检测时间、额定梯速、合格范围、平均减速度、实测梯速、检测方式、检测结果。”

2> Specific items for recording data: record the elevator number, parameters, detection method, total travel distance, real-time elevator speed, average slowdown rate, detection results, and conclusions;
3> In the recorded data, the process of querying operations performed by the device, and specific items that can be displayed: detection time, rated elevator speed, qualified range, average slowdown rate, measured elevator speed, detection method, and detection results.
请帮我翻译下面这段话：“设备开机，进入主界面后，点击“历史记录”按键，进入设备记录显示界面，每页提供5项不同的电梯编号进行显示；点击任意一条已显示的历史记录编号框，进入该电梯编号的参数记录显示界面；”

After the device is powered on and enters the main interface, click the "History Records" button to enter the device record display interface, which displays five different elevator numbers per page. Click on any displayed historical record number box to enter the parameter record display interface for that elevator number.

请帮我翻译下面这段话：“2> 根据显示的检测方式，在设备前端安装相应的检测套件；
3> 记录状态下的电梯参数，支持变更（此项目根据现场情况决定，正常无需更改）；在设置完成后，点击“功能操作”按键，进入检测方式选择界面，根据历史记录参数进行选择。”

2> Install the corresponding detection kit at the front end of the device based on the displayed detection method;
3> Record the elevator parameters in the recording state, supports changes (this project will be determined according to the on-site situation, no changes are required normally); After the settings are completed, click the "Function Operation" button to enter the detection method selection interface, and select based on the historical record parameters.

请帮我翻译下面这段话：“设备前端的检测连接部分，由前端转轮与钢性转轴组成；在使用钢丝绳方式进行检测时，需要连接前端转轮与钢丝绳进行接触；使用设备配备的专用工具，将设备与连接件可靠组合。
每次使用完后需擦去轮上的灰尘和油垢，以免腐蚀主轮缩短使用寿命。轮的外缘不得有严重磨损，磨损程度必须不至于影响其原有周长，否则会影响机器的测量精度，如发现严重磨损必须更换新轮。”

The detection connection part at the front end of the device is composed of a front-end pulley and a steel rigid shaft. When conducting detection using the wire rope method, it is necessary to connect the front-end pulley to make contact with the wire rope. Use the specialized tools provided with the device to securely combine the device with the connectors. 
After each use, it is necessary to wipe off the dust and grease on the pulley to prevent corrosion and shorten the service life of the main pulley. The outer edge of the pulley must not have severe wear, and the degree of wear must not affect its original circumference, otherwise it will affect the measurement accuracy of the machine. If severe wear is found, a new pulley must be replaced.
请帮我翻译下面这段话：“设备前端的检测连接部分，由前端顶针与柔性转轴组成；在使用转动轴方式进行检测时，需要连接前端顶针与转动轴进行接触；使用设备配备的专用工具，进行设备与连接件可靠组合；”

The detection connection part at the front end of the device is composed of a front-end probe and a flexible rotating shaft. When conducting detection using the rotational shaft method, it is necessary to connect the front-end probe to make contact with the rotating shaft. Use the specialized tools provided with the device to securely combine the device with the connectors.
请帮我翻译下面这段话：“在进行钢丝绳检测时，需要连接前端转轮使用，为防止在检测过程中出现滑绳丢数，和长期检测后前端转轮出现磨损的情况，需要使用防滑条；”

When conducting wire rope detection, it is necessary to connect and use the front-end pulley to prevent the occurrence of rope slipping and loss during the detection process, as well as to prevent wear on the front-end pulley after long-term use by using anti-slip bars.
请翻译：防滑带
Anti-slip strip/band
请翻译：“配5条钢带”
"5 steel straps provided"
请帮我翻译：“地震感知报警系统”
"Seismic Sensing Alarm System"
